title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Sanji, Big Mom, Jinbe as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like we've already passed through the first floor

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Hall of Treasures in front of the doors

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And for it to be boss jinbe, inside the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Report the following to all soldiers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we report any more untoward news to Mama's fickle ears,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama has been waiting for tomorrow's plan for a long time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think will happen if it all goes up in smoke?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the 4th floor! Seal off all corridors leading here,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And deal with the invaders on the 3rd floor or below!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If speed is of the essence, I believe killing them may be faster than attempting capture!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Fine. Whatever. I give you permission!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forget the germa and get out of here, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The German cling too fast to their old laurels!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What big mom wants is our science and technology.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She doesn't have much interest in the life of your Savior, either, by the way.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She'll dangle that floating restaurant over your head just as an excuse to kill father and your brothers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have any special love for those guys! I hate 'em too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I don't want you to die alongside them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I have emotions left in me, too...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been modified such that I cannot disobey Father's orders. I'm an accomplice.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My hands are plenty dirty. I deserve to die too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oh. One thing I forgot to mention.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I switched it out for a fake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Any other excuses for why you refuse to leave the island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take a long hard look at the most important things!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Straw hat's broken out of prison!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People as amazing as the ones you have now, as long as you live!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 60 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
